patch.value: Expose sentry telemetry gate as package script alias
Add a package.json script alias for scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs so agents do not guess a nonexistent pnpm sentry:telemetry:gate command when verifying release health.
Duplicate-safe package script alias exists for the Sentry/telemetry gate; release docs or command references mention the alias; existing direct script entrypoint continues to work.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Duplicate check: searched all statuses for 'sentry telemetry gate package script alias npm script'. Found related closed release/Sentry work (pm-nb08, pm-7zs0 and historical gates) but no active item specifically for a package script alias. Finding came from this lane: pnpm sentry:telemetry:gate is a plausible agent guess but package.json only exposes sentry:inject/sentry:upload/build:sentry while the real gate is node scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs.
